arts.ttl: Bromley boss has no imminent plans to replace ex-Millwall man Alan Dunne in backroom team
arts.sum: Andy Woodman has no plans to replace Alan Dunne until the end of the season out of respect for the former Bromley assistant manager. “It was pretty much like every other time we are trying to find players,” said the former Crystal Palace goalkeeping coach.

arts.ttl: John Eustace Derby County deal given massive thumbs up amid 'magic' Dwight Gayle verdict
arts.sum: Derby will hope Roofe can have the same kind of impact as Dwight Gayle did last season when the former Newcastle forward arrived on a similar deal after the transfer window closed. And with the Rams in desperate need of goals to aid their survival fight, readers of DerbyshireLive have been having their say on Roofe's arrival with the former Rangers forward having plenty of Championship experience at Leeds.

arts.ttl: Derby County boss throws injury doubt over duo ahead of Millwall clash
arts.sum: Derby County boss John Eustace says duo Nat Phillips and David Ozoh are “touch and go” for Millwall on Saturday. Millwall will be Eustace’s first home game in charge since he left play-off hopefuls Blackburn for relegation candidates Derby.

arts.ttl: John Eustace doesn't rule out another Derby County transfer after Kemar Roofe signing
arts.sum: John Eustace has not shut the door on adding another free agent to his Derby County squad after landing striker Kemar Roofe yesterday. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Preview: Derby County vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Derby County and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: John Eustace responds to Derby County transfer as free agent arrives
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. John Eustace says Kemar Roofe's record speaks for itself after the former Rangers striker signed a deal with Derby County until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Derby County sign former Leeds United, Rangers star Kemar Roofe on free transfer
arts.sum: Championship strugglers Derby County announce that they have signed former Leeds United and Rangers star Kemar Roofe on a free transfer.
